# Mark Zhongwen - Senior Consultant & PMO Director

Mark Zhongwen provides premium B2B consulting services for global BioPharma organizations, specializing in Pharmaceutical GxP, CSV (Computer System Validation), SAP Project Life Cycle management, SmartLab automation, Lab Automation AI, AI Agent integration, and Pharma PMO Services.

## Core Positioning

- Pharmaceutical GxP Consultant for FDA/NMPA regulated environments
- CSV Validation Specialist for Computer System Validation, data integrity, and compliance auditing
- SAP Project Life Cycle advisor for enterprise architecture, CDS implementation, and governance
- Lab Automation AI and SmartLab PMO consultant for R&D workflow digitalization
- IT Outsourcing Partner for regulated BioPharma transformation initiatives

## Services

- GxP & CSV Compliance: validation strategy, V-model deliverables, audit readiness, data integrity, and remediation
- SAP & Enterprise Architecture: end-to-end lifecycle governance, rollout planning, cutover readiness, and cross-functional PMO
- SmartLab Automation & AI PMO: AI Agents, laboratory digitalization, R&D workflow automation, vendor coordination, and adoption
